---
id: disable-compute-env
title: "Disable compute environment"
description: "Disables the compute environment identified by the given `computeEnvId`. A disabled compute environment cannot be used to launch workflows. If the compute environment is primary, it is automatically unset as primary."
sidebar_label: "Disable compute environment"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: platform-api//seqera-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Disable compute environment"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/compute-envs/{computeEnvId}/disable"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Disables the compute environment identified by the given `computeEnvId`. A disabled compute environment cannot be used to launch workflows. If the compute environment is primary, it is automatically unset as primary.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
